hero.title: Fundraising & Events
hero.subtitle: We host events that raise funds to support our students, with multiple ways to contribute — whether you join us in person or give on your own time.
events.heading: Events We've Hosted
events.lead: Throughout the year the PTA organizes fun community events that raise money for school programs.

cta.heading: Want to Help Plan an Event?
